evidence.source_title: 2016 Iranian Assembly of Experts election — Wikipedia
evidence.description: Hassan Khomeini, grandson of the Islamic Republic's founder, was among those disqualified by the Guardian Council from standing in the 2016 Assembly of Experts election. His rejection was widely covered and seen as a signal of hardliner dominance.

editorial_notes: Hassan Khomeini registered December 2015; rejected February 2016, appeal denied 10 February 2016.
